productName: RPG - 510 Cartridge - Cured Resin - Bubblegum Runtz - 1g
description: A convenient hybrid cartridge carrying Bubblegum Runtz's character into flavorful, on-demand vapor — discreet, simple, and ready to go. Convenient and clean, a sweet, fruity candy aroma with a smooth, euphoric, balanced feel, delivering a versatile, anytime balance.
